checks.criterion: EPS_SPECIFICATION.md contains formal definitions for EPS, Process Observation, Execution Event, Feature Vector, Aggregation, Normalization, Distance, Similarity
No forbidden INVERT or adapter dependencies in specification
Dimension names P1-P7 match PREREGISTRATION.md exactly

phase_1_implementation_pilot.timing: After extractor implementation; before full corpus extraction

sample.note: Pilot uses public tests only; no holdout labels

phase_2_extractor_lock.timing: Before full-scale EPS extraction on development corpus
phase_2_extractor_lock.description: GO/NO-GO for locking extractor code hash

criteria.name: feature_reproducibility
criteria.description: Fraction of (program, public_test) runs where EPS vector bitwise identical on re-extraction

criteria.name: cross_run_stability_expected
criteria.description: For programs without RNG/time calls, P2 == 0

criteria.name: expected_execution_cost
criteria.description: Median EPS extraction wall time / median sandbox-only execution time

criteria.name: hardware_independence_proxy
criteria.description: Rank correlation of P4 wall CV across same programs on two CPU classes if available; low correlation preferred

criteria.name: cross_platform_robustness_minimum
criteria.description: EPS v1.0 targets Linux sandbox only; success on frozen Linux image

criteria.name: scientific_interpretability
criteria.description: Each P1-P7 has operational definition mapping to EPS_SPECIFICATION section

criteria.name: leakage_audit_pass
criteria.description: Count of features using hidden labels, prompts, INVERT, or adapters

criteria.name: p6_pool_development_only
criteria.description: Implementation audit confirms P6 never recomputes pool on holdout

criteria.name: leakage_detected
criteria.condition: any feature computation reads withheld tests or outcome labels

criteria.name: invert_coupling
criteria.condition: extractor imports or calls INVERT Core detectors or adapters

criteria.name: dimension_drift
criteria.condition: implemented dimension names or count differ from P1-P7

criteria.name: trace_infeasible
criteria.condition: fraction programs with trace buffer overflow > 0.05 on pilot
EPS feature set changed after pilot based on latent-incorrectness correlation
opcode category table learned from labeled data
R or timeout changed without EPS version bump and OSF amendment

frozen_opcode_category_slots.note: Exact opcode-to-slot map fixed in implementation artifact opcode_categories_v1.json at extractor lock; slot names frozen here

decision_matrix.SPEC_GO: Phase 0 E0 checks pass and EG7, EG8, EG10 satisfied (specification lock)
decision_matrix.EXTRACTOR_GO: All required EG1-EG4, EG6, EG9 pass at phase 2

audit_record.notes: Specification frozen without implementation. Extractor GO pending future pilot.
